title: Initial Parameter Estimation Flow for Time Series Models
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process and common methods for obtaining initial parameter estimates in time series analysis, primarily for ARIMA models.
elements: Initial Parameter Estimation Methods (Yule-Walker, Hannan-Rissanen, etc.)
relationships: Process begins with Raw Data, which is plotted to form a Tentative Model Identification. This identification is used to select appropriate Initial Parameter Estimation Methods, which finally produce the Initial Parameter Estimates.
